---
title: "CV"
---

<div class="content-page">

<div class="cv-download-box">
  <div>Download a full copy of my curriculum vitae.</div>
  <a href="New_CV-3.pdf" target="_blank">Download CV (PDF)</a>
</div>

## Education

### Ph.D., Political Science
**University of South Carolina** — 2022–Present
Major Field: International Relations | Subfield: Comparative Politics

### M.A., International and Comparative Politics
**Wright State University** — 2016–2018
Thesis: *Nationalism and Regional Relations in Democratic Transitions*

### B.A., Politics, Philosophy, and Economics
**Asian University for Women**, Chittagong, Bangladesh — 2008–2014
Thesis: *Insights and Lessons from the Arab Spring*

---

## Selected Employment

| Position | Institution | Dates |
|---|---|---|
| Research Assistant (Dr. Jerry Silverman) | University of South Carolina | Jan 2025–Present |
| Graduate Assistant | University of South Carolina | 2022–Present |
| Associate Lecturer | Royal University of Bhutan | 2018–2022 |
| Assistant Lecturer | Royal University of Bhutan | 2015–2018 |
| Graduate Assistant | Wright State University | 2016–2018 |

---

## Skills

**Languages:** Dzongkha (native), Hindi, Nepali, Bengali

**Computing:** R, SAS, LaTeX, Overleaf, Quarto, R Markdown, GitHub

**Methods:** Principal Component Analysis, Factor Analysis, Cluster Analysis, Multivariate Regression, Random Forests, Support Vector Machines, Multiple Imputation, Multidimensional Scaling, Canonical Correlation

</div>
